text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Starting off on our headlines for today...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Gold City, an Umamusume model known to her
many fans as "Pretty City," recently announced
that she will compete in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Gold City boasts a huge following among the
teen demographic. I can't wait to see what kind of
beautiful running she has to show!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: In other news...

Today, Gold City begins training in earnest.
Thanks to her popularity as a model,
expectations are running high.
choice_data_list: (I'll work hard to get her ready for the races!)

text_block_list.text:
Making this silent promise to myself, I feel ready
to do some great work, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! Am I really late?!
choice_data_list: Just a little. Don't worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I see...

Gold City arrives late for our meeting. She seems
a little tense, too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah, dang it...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll get my warm-ups out of the way now. Hold on
a sec.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that City standing over there?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is! Congrats on your debut, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... Are you fans of mine?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We saw you on TV and wanted to come say
congratulations in person!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Wow, this is unreal! You're so pretty in person!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the support, but I'm in the middle
of training right now...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: There she is! City's actually here! Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh boy... What now?
Hey, you're blockin' da way. Move!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah! Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
City, don'tcha got trainin' now too? What're ya
doin' wastin' your time here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, guys, I have to go. Watch me in my race,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Please do your best!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry about that, Tamamo, but thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're too nice to your fans. Your debut's comin'
up, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya hafta learn how'ta better maneuver through
the attention! I'll see ya, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She actually gave me advice...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross. She's a year above me, but we'll
both be making our Twinkle Series debut this
year.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, it's like... on one hand, she's more
experienced than me, but we're also sort of on
the same level.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's get to training. I've already lost so
much time...
Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, you've got to be—

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
City, you there? Is now a good time? I need to
tell you something about yesterday's photo
shoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I said not to bother me when I'm on campus! Just
send me an email!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How many times do I need to tell her? I just want
to focus on training...

Gold City appears increasingly aggravated. I
doubt she'll be able to train efficiently if we start
now. With that in mind...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, what, I should clear my mind and just run till
I'm satisfied?

I tell her not to worry about distance or time. I
want her to run until she feels content.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What is this? Because I was late, you don't want
to do a proper training session anymore?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fine. You're the trainer here, so whatever
you say, boss.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to improve though!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Raaaaaah!

Gold City runs as if venting her frustration. She
frantically bulldozes ahead, ignoring her
surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

Her figure appears like sparkling gold. It's a
beautiful sight.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Haaahhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I ran off everything that was bothering me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
For being late. I'm so not a morning person, and
then yesterday's modeling job left me exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I can't complain when I'm the one who
decided to juggle both.
choice_data_list:
We can just work out an easygoing regimen for
mornings!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure?
choice_data_list:
Only if you can handle tougher sets in the
evening.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No problem. Still...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a huge pain for you if you always adjust for
my convenience.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't like compromising, and I can be selfish.
And I won't hide it when I'm irritated either.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So you're 100% going to get fed up with me at
some point... Would you still let me run then?
choice_data_list:
I promise I'll keep you on the track no matter
what.

I promise I'll keep you on the track no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I don't believe you. But I'll have to if
we're going to get started.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's see what you've got.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I want you to sort out a schedule with my
manager that'll let me prioritize training.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. How am I supposed to run till I'm content if
you can't even handle this much?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I need to show everyone I'm not just some pretty
doll to be gawked at.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Show me that I can trust you, Trainer.
